message:
✨ feat: Require triage approval before AI automation runs

Changes:
- Backend adds both 'ai-fix-requested' and 'needs-triage' labels when creating issues
- Workflow only triggers when 'triage/accepted' label is added
- Prevents wasting API credits on spam/duplicates/inappropriate issues

Flow:
1. User submits request → issue created with ai-fix-requested + needs-triage
2. Maintainer reviews and adds triage/accepted label
3. Workflow triggers and runs Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,8 +18,7 @@ permissions:
 jobs:
   ai-fix:
     if: |
-      (github.event_name == 'issues' && github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested') ||
-      (github.event_name == 'issues' && github.event.action == 'opened' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested')) ||
+      (github.event_name == 'issues' && github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'triage/accepted' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested')) ||
       github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
